title: KnY-Worlds
description: Dependency mod for Kimetsunoyaiba Tweaks adding the Mt Fujikasane dimension and the Swordsmith Village dimension region files
body:
# KnY Worlds

This mod is a **required dependency** for the [Kimetsunoyaiba Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/kimetsunoyaiba-tweaks) mod (which is an addon for [Orca's Kimetsunoyaiba mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/orca-kimetsu-no-yaiba)). [Kimetsunoyaiba Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/kimetsunoyaiba-tweaks) will not work without this mod.

## What does this mod add?

This mod contains the region files for the Swordsmith Village and the Mt. Fujikasane (final selection mountain) dimensions.

## Why do I need this mod?

This mod is a required dependency for the [Kimetsunoyaiba Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/kimetsunoyaiba-tweaks) mod, as it contains the region files for two of the dimensions that it adds. [Kimetsunoyaiba Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/kimetsunoyaiba-tweaks) will not work without this mod and it will give you an error.

The Swordsmith Village and Mt. Fujikasane are large handmade worlds, too big to fit in as nbt structures, and too detailed to be a world generator / biome. Thus, these dimensions must be imported as region files.

In the past, [Kimetsunoyaiba Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/kimetsunoyaiba-tweaks) had an external download, it would automatically download files from GitHub during startup, specifically to download the region files for Mt. Fujikasane and for Swordsmith Village. These automatic external downloads violated Content Rules on CurseForge (and possibly on Modrinth too).

So now, to comply with the Content Rules, [Kimemtsunoyaiba Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/kimetsunoyaiba-tweaks) no longer automatically downloads the region files during startup (as of version 1.6.482 and up). Instead, the region files are now contained in KnY Worlds (this mod here)

## Why is this a separate mod?

The region files are pretty large, they are 500 MB, which is pretty large for a mod.

The [Kimetsunoyaiba Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/kimetsunoyaiba-tweaks) mod is still in development and is actively receiving weekly updates. The KnY Worlds mod has been separated because you shouldn't need to redownload 500 MB of region files every time the Kimetsunoyaiba Tweaks mod updates.

If you want to stay up to date with [Kimetsunoyaiba Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/kimetsunoyaiba-tweaks), you only need to download this mod once (unless the changelog explicitely calls for it, which will hopefully be quite rare).

## Important Note

This mod is not standalone, it won't do anything unless you have the [Kimetsunoyaiba Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/kimetsunoyaiba-tweaks) mod.

## Credits

[Plasmatier](https://www.youtube.com/@HYPERPLASMATIER) - ideas, concept artist, textures, "makes the pixels pretty"

[Headset Hero](https://youtube.com/@headsethero80?si=gyEwMD8wdYOjy1Up) - wisteria biome and textures (blocks and potions)

[stxrwvbs](https://www.curseforge.com/members/stxrwvbs/) - ideas, concept artist, asset creation

[BoutiqueDivine](http://curseforge.com/members/boutiquedivine/) - concept artist, models and textures

[Luchar Olimur](https://www.tumblr.com/little-virus-sasha?source=share) - Portuguese (BR) translator

[asphodelian architect](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/asphodelian_architect/) - Builder
